reasoning: The control requires monitoring of inbound and outbound communications to detect attacks. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved through enabling audit logging to capture API interactions, using NetworkPolicies to monitor and control traffic flow, leveraging service mesh capabilities for traffic monitoring, and ensuring that ingress controllers have logging enabled to capture access details. These functions collectively help in detecting potential attacks and monitoring communications.
title: 3_14_6: 3.14.6 Monitor organizational systems, including inbound and outbound communications traffic, to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks
